name: atlas-ui
description: Atlas — the drop-in design language for agent UI. Framework-agnostic tokens, 50+ component classes, and multi-surface patterns that any coding agent can read and translate into shadcn, Tailwind, React, Vue, or raw HTML.

plugins.name: atlas
plugins.description: Atlas design language skill. 180+ tokens, 50+ .atlas-* component classes, ~8 markdown reference docs (tokens, components, theming, patterns, responsive, motion, lessons, examples). Teaches coding agents the Atlas aesthetic, vocabulary, and composition recipes — they generate code in your target stack.
